Passed checks: `cargo test -p zkf-lib implementation_closure_generated_outputs_match_repo_files --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_plan_commitment_tamper_fails --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_state_commitment_tamper_fails --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_tampered_running_minimum_fails --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_small_step_witness_satisfies_constraints --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib --lib`; `cargo test -p zkf-core --lib`; `cargo test -p zkf-backends --lib`; `cargo test -p zkf-integration-tests --test private_nbody_orbital_showcase -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-integration-tests --test private_satellite_conjunction_showcase -- --nocapture`; and `cargo test -p zkf-integration-tests --test private_voting_commitment_pipeline -- --nocapture`.
recent_delivery: Added a shared generated-closure and formal-evidence layer in `zkf-lib::evidence` that reads only the live truth sources (`zkf-ir-spec/verification-ledger.json`, `.zkf-completion-status.json`, `docs/CANONICAL_TRUTH.md`, and `support-matrix.json`), normalizes them to the approved assurance vocabulary, and validates checked-in repo extracts under `forensics/generated/`. Standardized the orbital, satellite, and private-voting exporters on those generated closure extracts so `formal/exercised_surfaces.json` is now a repo-generated closure document, and surfaced the generated closure path and assurance counts in the bundle manifest and reports. Tightened truth-sync with unit tests that rebuild the generated documents in memory, integration tests that require the generated closure path/counts in exported bundles, and a satellite integration helper fix that always rebuilds the release example binary instead of reusing a stale artifact from disk.
